name_en: 💐Top-tier replica quality【Real photos】Model M Ultra Mini Market Basket, with spacious compartments inside and out for your small essentials. The cotton canvas lining features a street fashion-inspired print pattern, and comes with a matching crossbody strap for hands-free convenience and better portability. Dimensions 16*14
